generated_oml:
// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR for 3D environmental mapping and object detection using DBSCAN clustering and Kalman filtering for point cloud processing."
    DTDFVocab:producedData RawLiDARPointCloudData
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435iCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera for visual perception and object tracking, integrated with LiDAR data for sensor fusion."
    DTDFVocab:producedData RawCameraDepthData
]

instance VehicleStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vehicle state sensors (speed, steering angle) integrated into the lower-level chassis, processed via Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking module."
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleStateData
]

instance NvidiaJetsonOrinNano : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano microcomputer for real-time sensor data fusion and processing of LiDAR, camera, and vehicle state data."
    DTDFVocab:producedData FusedSensorData
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance RawLiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]

instance RawCameraDepthData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435iCamera
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleStateSensor
]

instance FusedSensorData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom NvidiaJetsonOrinNano
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance DBSCANClusteringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Point Cloud Clustering Model using DBSCAN algorithm for clustering raw LiDAR data into object clusters."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudProcessingEnabler
]

instance KalmanFilterTrackingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman Filter Tracking Model for estimating object states (position, velocity) from clustered point clouds."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudProcessingEnabler
]

instance ACCControlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Adaptive Cruise Control (ACC) Model implementing Performance Class I (ISO 15622) with distance-based speed adjustment logic."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCControlEnabler
]

instance EgoVehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Structured representation of ego vehicle state including speed, steering angle, and timestamp."
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleStateData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataVisualizationEnabler, ACCControlEnabler
]

instance ObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Structured object tracks data containing position, velocity, and classification metadata from processed LiDAR and camera data."
    DTDFVocab:fromData FusedSensorData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataVisualizationEnabler, DataStorageEnabler
]

instance ProjectedDrivingPathData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Projected driving path data derived from ego vehicle state and object tracks for path planning and visualization."
    DTDFVocab:fromData EgoVehicleStateData, ObjectTracksData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataVisualizationEnabler
]

instance TimeSeriesVehicleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data of vehicle state and object tracks stored in external SQL database for historical analysis."
    DTDFVocab:fromData EgoVehicleStateData, ObjectTracksData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataStorageEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance PointCloudProcessingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2-based enabler for processing raw LiDAR and camera data using DBSCAN clustering and Kalman filtering, implemented in Python 3.8 and C++."
    DTDFVocab:enables ObjectTrackingService, SensorFusionService
]

instance ACCControlEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2-based enabler for executing ACC logic with performance class I (ISO 15622) control strategies, implemented in MATLAB/Simulix and C++."
    DTDFVocab:enables AdaptiveCruiseControlService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance DataVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "3D Visualization User Interface FE for real-time rendering of vehicle state, object tracks, and projected driving path using custom visualization libraries."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance DataTranslationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Custom Data Translation FE (ISO 23247) for message serialization, unit conversion, and protocol alignment between ROS2 and Wi-Fi communication."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance DataStorageEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL-based storage enabler for time-series data of vehicle state and object tracks, external to PT due to limited onboard storage."
    DTDFVocab:enables ReportGenerationService
]

instance ClockSynchronizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Hardware-constrained clock synchronization enabler with 100 ms accuracy for time-stamping sensor data and ensuring temporal alignment."
    DTDFVocab:enables ObjectTrackingService, SensorFusionService
]

// C6: Services
instance ObjectTrackingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for generating and maintaining object tracks from raw LiDAR point clouds using DBSCAN clustering and Kalman filtering."
    DTDFVocab:provides ObjectTrackInsight
]

instance SensorFusionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for fusing LiDAR, camera, and vehicle state data into coherent object tracks and vehicle state representations."
    DTDFVocab:provides SensorFusionInsight
]

instance AdaptiveCruiseControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for executing ACC logic with distance-based speed adjustment, offloaded from PT to DT for computational efficiency."
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCDecisionInsight, EmergencyBrakingAction
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for real-time visualization of ego vehicle state, object tracks, and projected driving path via 3D Visualization UI."
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVisualizationInsight
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for UI-based control of ACC (enable/disable, set desired speed, emergency braking) via Control Panel UI."
    DTDFVocab:provides RemoteControlAction
]

instance ReportGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for generating human-readable reports of object tracks and vehicle state as time-series data."
    DTDFVocab:provides ReportInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance ObjectTrackInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of object tracks generated from LiDAR point clouds, used for ACC decision-making and visualization."
]

instance SensorFusionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Fused sensor data insights combining LiDAR, camera, and vehicle state for improved object detection and tracking accuracy."
]

instance ACCDecisionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Performance analytics of ACC decisions including speed adjustments, braking events, and distance maintenance."
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "3D visualization of ego vehicle state, object tracks, and projected driving path for real-time monitoring and troubleshooting."
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote triggering of emergency braking functionality via Digital Twin system through Physical Twin Entity."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance RemoteControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "UI-based control of ACC parameters including enable/disable states and desired speed adjustments."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ReportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Historical analysis of object tracks and vehicle state for troubleshooting, parameter updates, and predictive maintenance."
]

// C2: Acting Components
instance MotorActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor actuation system for speed control, converting desired speed into motor voltage commands via Vedder Electronic Speed Controller."
]

instance SteeringServoActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo actuation for directional control, interfaced through the lower-level chassis."
]

instance EmergencyBrakeActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Emergency braking functionality triggered remotely via Digital Twin system through Actuation Functional Entity."
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The interactions from the virtual twin (DT) to the physical twin (PT) include:
  - **Desired speed commands** computed by the **ACC Controlling FE** in the DT, sent back to the PT for motor actuation.
  - **Remote management commands** (enable/disable ACC, set desired speed, emergency braking) transmitted via the **Control Panel User Interface FE** to the **Actuation FE** in the PT.
  - **Actuation signals** (motor voltage, steering commands) executed by the **Actuation FE** in the **Physical Twin Entity** (custom extension of ISO 23247)."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The DT operates at **real-time synchronization** with the following constraints:
  - **End-to-end latency** ≤ **100 ms** (from PT to DT Entity) to support real-time computation offloading, as per **3GPP Technical Specification 22.185** for V2V communication.
  - **Clock synchronization** accuracy of **100 ms** between PT and DT components to ensure event ordering and data integrity in distributed systems.
  - **Perception cycle updates** for object tracks and vehicle state (frequency not explicitly stated but implied to be high for real-time ACC)."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation follows the **ISO 23247 Reference Architecture (RA)** with custom adaptations:
  - **Physical Twin Entity** (custom): Hosts **sensing (LiDAR, camera)**, **actuation (motor, steering)**, and **data pre-processing** (point cloud clustering/tracking).
  - **Digital Twin Entity**: Implements **data collection**, **ACC control**, **reporting**, and **visualization pre-processing**.
  - **User Entity**: Provides **3D Visualization** and **Control Panel** interfaces (split from the monolithic **User Interface FE** in ISO 23247).
  - **Cross-System Entity**: **Data Translation FE** for inter-entity communication.
  - **Deployment**: Components deployed across **PT (Jetson Orin Nano)**, **DT (external cloud/edge)**, and **User Entity (UI)**."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT covers the following lifecycle stages:
  - **Design Phase**: Used as a **cyber-physical experimentation facility** for ACC development, leveraging **3D CAD design** and simulators (e.g., **CREO Simulate** for predictive maintenance in other use cases).
  - **Operation Phase**: Enables **real-time monitoring, remote management, and predictive maintenance** (e.g., brake system prognosis in referenced works).
  - **Representation Phase**: Represents the PT **as operated**, with real-time synchronization of vehicle state and object tracks. No explicit mention of **as-designed** or **as-manufactured** phases."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are addressed through:
  - **Real-Time Synchronization**: **100 ms latency** and **clock sync** ensure temporal fidelity for ACC operations.
  - **Data Accuracy**: **Kalman filtering** and **DBSCAN clustering** improve object track fidelity.
  - **Validation Mechanisms**: Compliance with **ISO 15622** for ACC (performance class I) and **3GPP 22.185** for latency.
  - **Uncertainty**: Not explicitly quantified, but implied via **hardware limitations** (e.g., 100 ms clock sync accuracy).
  - **Verification**: Demonstrated via **public artifacts** (code, demo) and adherence to **ROS2** and **ISO 23247** standards."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Technical connections include:
  - **Intra-System (PT)**: **ROS2** network for communication between **Jetson Orin Nano**, sensors, and actuators.
  - **Inter-System (PT ↔ DT)**: **Wi-Fi** for low-latency (<100 ms) data exchange between PT and DT Entity.
  - **Protocols**: **UDP/TCP** (implied via ROS2/Wi-Fi) for real-time data streams.
  - **Data Translation**: Custom **Data Translation FE** handles serialization, unit conversion, and message alignment between ROS2 and Wi-Fi."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is hosted and deployed as follows:
  - **Physical Twin (PT)**: Onboard **NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano** with **ROS2** middleware.
  - **Digital Twin Entity**: Deployed externally (cloud/edge) for computation offloading, with **SQL database** for data storage.
  - **User Entity**: Hosted on a separate system for **3D Visualization** and **Control Panel** interfaces.
  - **Hardware Constraints**: **100 ms clock synchronization** and **<100 ms latency** dictate deployment choices."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Horizontal integration is limited to:
  - **ROS2 Middleware**: Enables modular integration of **sensors (LiDAR, camera)**, **actuators (motor, steering)**, and **control logic (ACC)**.
  - **No explicit external systems**: No mention of integration with **ERP**, **PLM**, or other automotive ecosystems beyond the PT-DT constellation.
  - **Data Exchange**: Primarily internal to the DT system (e.g., PT ↔ DT ↔ User Entity)."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT adheres to the following standards:
  - **ISO 23247 (Part 2)**: Reference Architecture for Digital Twin Manufacturing Framework, adapted for automotive use (e.g., **entity-based structure**, **Functional Entities**).
  - **ISO 15622**: Adaptive Cruise Control (ACC) performance requirements (performance class I implemented).
  - **3GPP Technical Specification 22.185**: Service requirements for **Vehicle-to-Vehicle (V2V) communication** (100 ms latency constraint).
  - **ROS2**: Middleware standard for robotics and autonomous systems.
  - **IEC 62541 (OPC UA)**: Implied as a potential alternative for **Data Translation FE** (though not explicitly used in this case)."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Security and safety considerations include:
  - **Safety-Critical Operations**: ACC and emergency braking are executed with **<100 ms latency** and **100 ms clock sync** to mitigate risks.
  - **Remote Management**: **Human-in-the-Loop** design (as per **Liberty to act vs. Ability to act** taxonomy) ensures operator oversight for critical actions (e.g., emergency braking).
  - **Data Integrity**: **Clock synchronization** and **real-time validation** (e.g., object track consistency) reduce risks of erroneous commands.
  - **No Explicit Cybersecurity Measures**: No mention of encryption, authentication, or intrusion detection for PT-DT communication.
  - **Hardware Limitations**: **100 ms clock sync accuracy** may introduce risks in stricter safety-critical applications (e.g., full autonomy)."
]
